title: Jawlark Fly Zapper Electric Indoor & Outdoor, 4200V Bug Catcher Zapper UV light, Mosquito Killer Lamp, Effectively Eliminates Mosquitoes, Flies, Fruit Flies, Insects and the like
bullet_points: 【High-Power 4200V Electric Fly Zapper & Insect Killer】This 18W bug zapper uses a 365nm UV light to attract mosquitoes, flies, gnats, moths, wasps and other flying pests. Once lured in, the high-voltage 4200V mesh instantly eliminates insects physically and effectively – with no chemicals or odours. Ideal as an electric fly zapper and mosquito killer for home use

【Family & Pet-Safe Design】Our fly catcher is engineered with user safety in mind. The internal electric grid is fully enclosed in a protective housing, preventing accidental contact by children or pets. A clean, eco-friendly way to control insects indoors and out

【IP44 Rated for Indoor & Outdoor Use】Built with IP44 waterproof protection, this fly killer works reliably on patios, in gardens, garages and kitchens – rain or shine. Use it as a fruit fly trap near bins or as a general insect killer wherever pests gather

【Easy to Hang & Simple to Clean】A handy hanging loop offers flexible placement. The removable catch tray and included cleaning brush make maintenance quick and hygienic. Just plug in this fruit fly traps indoor unit – it works automatically. Always unplug before cleaning

【UK Support & Satisfaction Guarantee】We stand behind the quality of our mosquito killer products. If you’re not completely satisfied with your fly zapper, contact us for support or a refund – we ensure a reliable after-sales experience
